# Kunal Builds

Kunal Builds is the developer identity of Kunal, a web and app developer from Haryana, India.

Website:
https://heyitskunal.vercel.app

About:
https://heyitskunal.vercel.app/about

Who is Kunal:
https://heyitskunal.vercel.app/who-is-kunal

Projects:
https://heyitskunal.vercel.app/projects

Services:
https://heyitskunal.vercel.app/services

Contact:
https://heyitskunal.vercel.app/contact

Kunal Builds creates websites, landing pages, dashboards, mobile apps, UI/UX interfaces, website redesigns, and startup MVPs using React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, React Native, Expo, Firebase, and Supabase.
